project_identity.name: Sistema de Asistencia Escolar (SAE)
project_identity.description: Local PC system for student attendance via QR codes.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and modal titles. Tracking-tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all standard text, inputs, and data tables. Excellent legibility for numbers and codes.

mono.usage: Use for Student IDs (Cédula) and QR code alphanumeric representations.

primary.description: Deep Navy / Slate 900. Represents authority and stability.

secondary.description: Slate 100. Used for secondary buttons and backgrounds.

accent.description: Safety Orange. Use sparingly for critical actions (Scan, Alert) or highlights.

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.
spacing.radius: rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-md (4px). Avoid fully rounded corners to maintain a 'technical' feel.

customization_rules: Remove default rounded-xl radii, use rounded-md.
Input fields: bg-white border-slate-300 focus:border-slate-500 focus:ring-slate-500.
Buttons: uppercase text-xs tracking-wider font-bold for primary actions.
Cards: simple borders (border-slate-200), no heavy shadows.

QRScanner.description: Central viewport component. Dark overlay with a transparent square in the center. 'Scan Active' indicator in Green.

StudentCard.description: Compact card showing Name, ID, Specialty badge, and Quick Actions (Edit, Delete, QR).

Sidebar.description: Fixed left sidebar. Dark Navy background (#0F172A) with white text. Active state: bg-white/10.

layout_strategies.dashboard: Sidebar Layout. Main content area with top bar (breadcrumbs, user profile).
layout_strategies.grid_system: Responsive grid. Mobile: 1 col. Tablet: 2 cols. Desktop: 3-4 cols for stats/cards.

images.description: Modern technical school building. Use as a side panel image for Login/Register pages.
Student focused. Use for 'No Students Found' or initial dashboard state.

tech_stack.frontend: React (Vite), Tailwind CSS, React Router, Axios

universal_guidelines: Error states must be clear and descriptive (red border + text).
Success states should auto-dismiss after 3 seconds (Sonner toast).
